scripts.build: wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg && node scripts/prepare-pkg.mjs pkg
scripts.build:bundler: wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir pkg-bundler && node scripts/prepare-pkg.mjs pkg-bundler
scripts.build:web: wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg-web && node scripts/prepare-pkg.mjs pkg-web
scripts.test:web: wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg-web && node scripts/prepare-pkg.mjs pkg-web
